steps.observed: RateLimiter(max_calls=180, time_window=60) with sliding window enforcement. wait_if_needed() sleeps when limit reached.

steps.expected: rate_limiter.wait_if_needed() called before each API request
steps.observed: Confirmed: _request_with_retry() calls self.rate_limiter.wait_if_needed() before every API call, plus 0.3s base delay
Line 71: TushareClient initialized. Line 324: self.tushare_client.fetch_daily() — all calls rate-limited

steps.action: Grep logs for rate-limit errors: '达到调用限制', 'exceed', '429'
steps.observed: 0 occurrences of '达到调用限制'. '429' matches are all timestamp substrings (e.g., '14:45:11,429'). 'exceed' matches are 'IP数量超限' (pre-existing IP count issue, not rate limit). No actual rate-limit errors found.

evidence.codeInspection: RateLimiter in tushare_client.py enforces 180 calls/min sliding window. All backfill API calls go through _request_with_retry() → rate_limiter.wait_if_needed().
evidence.logGrep: grep '达到调用限制' logs/ → 0 matches. grep '429' → only timestamp matches. grep 'exceed' → only IP count limit (known pre-existing issue).

assertions.title: Backfill Does Not Conflict With Live Scheduler

steps.observed: PRAGMA journal_mode returns 'wal'

steps.action: Inspect database.py for WAL mode and timeout configuration
steps.observed: WAL mode set via PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL on every connection. Timeout=30s. PRAGMA synchronous=NORMAL and cache_size=10000 also set.

steps.action: Grep logs for 'database is locked' during backfill period
steps.expected: No lock errors during backfill runs
steps.observed: Current service.log (containing backfill runs on 2026-03-26): 0 occurrences. Older logs (service.log.2, .4) have some from pre-backfill era (Feb-Mar 2026 30m kline updates — known issue).

evidence.logGrep: No 'database is locked' in service.log during backfill runs (2026-03-26)

assertions.title: Backfill Uses TuShare pro.daily() for Stocks

steps.observed: Line 44: imports TushareClient. Line 71: instantiates TushareClient. Line 324: calls self.tushare_client.fetch_daily(ts_code=ts_code, start_date=start_date, end_date=end_date)
In tushare_client.py, fetch_daily() calls self._request_with_retry(self.pro.daily, ...) where self.pro = ts.pro_api(token)

steps.action: Check for Sina or AkShare usage in backfill script
steps.observed: grep confirms 0 occurrences of 'akshare', 'AkShare', 'sina', or 'Sina' in backfill_stock_daily.py

steps.expected: Periodic progress logging at regular intervals
steps.observed: PROGRESS_LOG_INTERVAL=50. log_progress() called every 50 stocks showing: count/total, success/skip/fail, rows inserted, rate, ETA. Also called at completion.
Prints [idx/total] per trade date, plus progress indicator every 50 dates with percentage and ETA

steps.action: Check logs for actual progress output
steps.observed: service.log contains: 'Stock Daily Kline Backfill', 'Progress: 10/10 (100.0%)', 'BACKFILL COMPLETE' — confirms progress logging works

evidence.codeInspection: PROGRESS_LOG_INTERVAL=50 in backfill_stock_daily.py. All 4 scripts log per-item progress and completion summary.

steps.action: Inspect backfill_stock_daily.py for empty response handling
steps.expected: Script logs warning and continues when TuShare returns empty
steps.observed: Lines 330-334: if df is None or df.empty: logger.warning('Empty response from TuShare (may be delisted/suspended)'); return (False, 0)

steps.action: Check for try/except around fetch and insert operations
steps.expected: Exceptions caught, script continues to next stock
steps.observed: Three levels of exception handling: (1) outer try/except around entire fetch+save (line 320/389), (2) inner try/except around DB operations (line 362/381), (3) catch-all in main loop (line 495) with 'continue' to proceed to next stock

steps.action: Verify main loop continues after failures
steps.observed: Line 497: 'continue' after logging error and incrementing fail_count — processing resumes with next stock

evidence.codeInspection: Empty response → warning + return. Exceptions → error log + continue. backfill_index_daily.py follows same pattern.

usage: backfill_index_daily.py [-h] [--dry-run] — exit code 0
usage: backfill_concept_daily.py [-h] [--dry-run] [--start-date] [--limit] — exit code 0
usage: backfill_industry_daily.py [-h] [--dry-run] [--start-date] [--end-date] [--batch-size] — exit code 0

evidence.cliExecution: All 4 backfill scripts run with --help without import errors, exit code 0. All use argparse with if __name__ == '__main__' entry points.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed. All code inspection, database queries, and CLI tests confirm proper implementation of rate limiting (VAL-010), WAL-mode concurrency (VAL-011), TuShare pro.daily() usage (VAL-013), OHLCV data integrity (VAL-015), progress logging (VAL-016), graceful error handling for delisted stocks (VAL-017), and CLI entry points (VAL-020).
